heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds, except mostly cloudy northeast. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm; heavy rainfall possible. Highs from the mid 80s to around 90, some lower 80s far north. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph west of the Greens.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm; heavy rainfall possible. Lows in the mid to upper 60s, some lower 60s northeast, and around 70 in the Champlain Valley. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, becoming light and variable elsewhere.

heading: Friday
text: Partly cloudy. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm, a rising chance in New York late in the day; a severe storm possible. Highs in the upper 80s to lower 90s, some mid 80s northeast, and low to mid 90s in southeastern valleys. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
